channel.title: Anthropic Повний Фід - AI-PULSE
channel.description: Повний фід: новини, інженерія та дослідження безпеки ШІ від Anthropic (українською мовою)
channel.generator: AI-PULSE RSS Generator - Ukrainian Complete Translation

item.title: [Безпека ШІ] Automated Weak-to-Strong Researcher
item.description: AI Safety research: We built autonomous AI agents that propose ideas, run experiments, and iterate on an open research p... (Джерело: Alignment Science)

item.title: [Безпека ШІ] A3: An Automated Alignment Agent for Safety Finetuning
item.description: AI Safety research: We introduce our Automated Alignment Agent (A3), a new agentic framework which automatically mitigat... (Джерело: Alignment Science)

item.title: [Безпека ШІ] Towards training-time mitigations for alignment faking in RL
item.description: AI Safety research: We construct a diverse array of model organisms of alignment faking and study mitigations that could... (Джерело: Alignment Science)

item.title: [Безпека ШІ] Reasoning Models Don't Always Say What They Think
item.description: AI Safety research: We find that reasoning models don't always accurately verbalize their reasoning. This casts doubt on... (Джерело: Alignment Science)

item.title: [Безпека ШІ] Alignment Faking Revisited: Improved Classifiers and Open Source Extensions
item.description: AI Safety research: We present a replication and extension of an alignment faking model organism.... (Джерело: Alignment Science)

item.title: [Безпека ШІ] Auditing Language Models for Hidden Objectives
item.description: AI Safety research: We deliberately train a language model with a hidden objective and use it as a testbed for studying ... (Джерело: Alignment Science)

item.title: [Безпека ШІ] Automated Researchers Can Subtly Sandbag
item.description: AI Safety research: Current models can sandbag ML experiments and research decisions without being detected by zero-shot... (Джерело: Alignment Science)

item.title: [Безпека ШІ] Introducing Anthropic's Safeguards Research Team
item.description: AI Safety research: We're launching a new research team focused on mitigating the post-deployment risks of AI systems.... (Джерело: Alignment Science)

item.title: [Безпека ШІ] Forecasting Rare Language Model Behaviors
item.description: AI Safety research: We forecast whether risks will occur after a model is deployed — using even very limited sets of tes... (Джерело: Alignment Science)

item.title: [Безпека ШІ] Alignment Faking in Large Language Models
item.description: AI Safety research: We present experiments where Claude often pretends to have different views during training, while ac... (Джерело: Alignment Science)

item.title: [Безпека ШІ] How to Replicate and Extend our Alignment Faking Demo
item.description: AI Safety research: We describe how to get started with experimenting with our demonstration of alignment faking, and pr... (Джерело: Alignment Science)

item.title: [Безпека ШІ] Sabotage Evaluations for Frontier Models
item.description: AI Safety research: How well could AI models mislead us, or secretly sabotage tasks, if they were trying to? We describe... (Джерело: Alignment Science)

item.title: [Безпека ШІ] Simple Probes can Catch Sleeper Agents
item.description: AI Safety research: We find that probing, a simple interpretability technique, can detect when backdoored "sleeper agent... (Джерело: Alignment Science)

item.title: [Безпека ШІ] Sleeper Agents: Training Deceptive LLMs that Persist Through Safety Training
item.description: AI Safety research: We train LLMs to act secretly malicious. We find that, despite our best efforts at alignment trainin... (Джерело: Alignment Science)

item.title: [Безпека ШІ] Discovering Language Model Behaviors with Model-Written Evaluations
item.description: AI Safety research: We develop an automated way to generate language model (LM) evaluations with LMs, significantly redu... (Джерело: Alignment Science)

item.description: AI Safety research: We introduce a red-teaming framework for evaluating training interventions against diffuse threats f... (Джерело: Alignment Science)
